phrases.intent_en: Ask where Estação Santa Catarina is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar-me onde fica a Estação Santa Catarina?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FI-kah uh eh-tah-SOWN jee-MEH-troh SAHN-tah kah-tah-REE-nah
phrases.cultural_note: Metro entrances are frequently described relative to prominent street-level shops.

likely_response.local: Localiza-se na Rua de Santa Catarina, junto à Praça da Batalha.
likely_response.pronunciation: loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh, ZHOONNG-too AH PRAH-suh DUH buh-TAH-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: It is located on Santa Catarina Street, next to Batalha Square.

responses.english: It is located on Santa Catarina Street, next to Batalha Square.
responses.phonetic: loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh, ZHOONNG-too AH PRAH-suh DUH buh-TAH-lyuh.
responses.french: Localiza-se na Rua de Santa Catarina, junto à Praça da Batalha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Passagem do Almada is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Passagem do Almada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-SAH-zhayng DOO ahl-MAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Passages are often discreet and identified by adjacent businesses.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Passagem do Almada.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-SAH-zhayng DOO ahl-MAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Passagem do Almada.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Passagem do Almada.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-SAH-zhayng DOO ahl-MAH-duh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Passagem do Almada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Passagem do Almada is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Passagem do Almada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah ah pah-SAH-jee-oo doo ahl-MAH-dah?
phrases.cultural_note: Passagem do Almada is a covered shopping arcade with Art Deco architecture.

likely_response.local: Fica na mesma rua, em frente ao Majestic.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NUH MEHZH-muh ROOUH, AYNG FRAYNG-tih OW muh-zhihsh-TEEK.
likely_response.translation_en: It's on the same street, opposite the Majestic.

responses.english: It's on the same street, opposite the Majestic.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NUH MEHZH-muh ROOUH, AYNG FRAYNG-tih OW muh-zhihsh-TEEK.
responses.french: Fica na mesma rua, em frente ao Majestic.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Café A Brasileira is located
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde fica o Café A Brasileira?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW kuh-FEH AH bruh-zee-LAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Café A Brasileira is a historic café in Porto, known for its art deco interior and as a meeting place for intellectuals.

likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh, SAYNG-tooee-veen-tih.

responses.phonetic: NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh, SAYNG-tooee-veen-tih.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada da Estação Santa Catarina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH shtuh-SOWN SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct instructions are standard in Portuguese retail and transit contexts.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Estação Santa Catarina.

responses.french: Siga as placas para a Estação Santa Catarina.

likely_response.local: Pergunte no Anjo de Santa Catarina.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Anjo de Santa Catarina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AHNNG-zhoo DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente do balcão de informações turísticas; eles podem ajudar com a localização.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR KOHM AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the attendant at the tourist information desk; they can help with the location.

responses.english: Ask the attendant at the tourist information desk; they can help with the location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR KOHM AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.

phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR AH puh-SAH-zhayng DOO ahl-MAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff typically give concise, landmark-based directions.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Anjo de Santa Catarina is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Anjo de Santa Catarina?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POH-soo ver-oo AN-joo jee SAN-ta ka-ta-REE-na
phrases.cultural_note: Locals reference visible architectural features for quick orientation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está na fachada de um edifício na Rua de Santa Catarina.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH fuh-SHAH-duh DIH OONNG eh-dee-FEES-yoo NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, it is on the facade of a building on Rua de Santa Catarina.

responses.english: Good day, it is on the facade of a building on Rua de Santa Catarina.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH fuh-SHAH-duh DIH OONNG eh-dee-FEES-yoo NUH ROOUH DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, está na fachada de um edifício na Rua de Santa Catarina.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Café Majestic nesta rua?
phrases.cultural_note: Major landmarks are used as primary directional anchors in Porto.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga reto até à Praça da Batalha.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh REH-too uh-TEH AH PRAH-suh DUH buh-TAH-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, go straight until Batalha Square.

responses.english: Good day, go straight until Batalha Square.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh REH-too uh-TEH AH PRAH-suh DUH buh-TAH-lyuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga reto até à Praça da Batalha.
